# Generated model routing

<!-- generated by site/scripts/generate-model-routing.mjs; edit docs/prompting/model-registry.yaml instead -->

**Registry verified at:** 2026-07-18
**Freshness window:** 45 days

Capabilities and availability change; refresh from official sources before routing production work. Vendor benchmarks are vendor-reported. Bare gpt-5.6 is invalid; use exact routed IDs such as gpt-5.6-sol.

## Requested Label Accountability

| Requested label | Status | Canonical value | Evidence gap |
|---|---|---|---|
| GPT-5.6 Sol | supported_exact | `gpt-5.6-sol` |  |

| Kimi K2.7 Code | supported_exact | `kimi-for-coding` |  |
| Kimi K2.6 | supported_family | `kimi-k2.6` | Official Kimi Code docs describe K2.6 as the route used when thinking is disabled for K3 or K2.7; no standalone exact API model ID was confirmed in this audit. |
| MiniMax M3 | supported_exact | `MiniMax-M3` |  |
| Qwen 3.7 Max | supported_exact | `qwen3.7-max` |  |
| Qwen 3.6 variants | supported_family | `qwen3.6-plus-or-flash` |  |
| DeepSeek V4 Pro | supported_exact | `deepseek-v4-pro` |  |
| DeepSeek V4 Flash | supported_exact | `deepseek-v4-flash` |  |

## Critic Separation Rule

Use a different model family for independent criticism when one is available in the harness. A producer model cannot certify its own output; the critic must grade observable acceptance evidence against the original requirements.
